title: Over the past year, I've grown my account to $250,000 using swing trading, my next goal is $500,000.
author: ProposalSuperb3370
selftext:
I used to be obsessed with day trading charts, chasing market trends, and overtrading, which slowly destroyed my account.

About a year ago, I switched to swing trading and started focusing on structures on higher timeframes. Since making that switch, I haven't had a single losing quarter.

I will explain the method of swing trading in the order of the pictures.

Figure 2: The stock price establishes a series of higher highs and higher lows, trading above both the 20-day and 50-day moving averages. Establish a position when the price returns to the vicinity of the trend line and the 20-day moving average. A bullish candlestick pattern has emerged at the support level, with the price breaking through the previous high and accompanied by strong upward momentum, indicating that the trend will continue. Once the stock price reaches the predetermined target level, I execute a profitable exit.

Figure 3: The stock price undergoes a sustained decline, establishing a downward-sloping trendline. The price then breaks above this downtrend line, signaling a potential trend reversal. The price subsequently pulls back to retest the trendline, finding support at this level and triggering a buy entry. The stock price proceeds to break above the previous high, demonstrating bullish momentum. Choose to take profits when the stock price reaches the target level.

I have compiled a more detailed guide on my swing trading strategies into a dedicated folder. If you are interested in swing trading, please feel free to leave a comment or send me a private message; I am happy to provide a free copy to anyone who needs it.

comments.author: cheezweiner
comments.body: Another day, another person using this sub to try and lure in people for their own financial gain.

replies.author: ProposalSuperb3370
replies.body: I share my trading experience and methods not for any personal gain, but to help those who are feeling lost. If my content is not helpful to you, you can choose to ignore it, but please do not misunderstand my intentions.

replies.author: cheezweiner
replies.body: The post about your bot and link everything. No reason for people to have to DM you for information you can help them with in this thread

replies.author: ProposalSuperb3370
replies.body: My complete and detailed strategy is organized and placed in a folder. Sending folders directly is not allowed here, please understand my approach.

replies.author: cheezweiner
replies.body: If it’s a GitHub repo, link to that. If it’s a bunch of text in Google Drive, link to that… ? It’s stored somewhere I imagine…

replies.author: ProposalSuperb3370
replies.body: I understand your concerns, but my goal has always been to assist those who wish to learn. If you have any questions regarding my approach, you are welcome to raise them, and we can explore them together.

comments.author: GermanLetsKotz
comments.body: I think we can safely delete this sub
